requirements.statement: All data at rest must be encrypted. AES-256 minimum.
Audit logs for every user action — who did what, when.
Multi-factor authentication is mandatory for all users.
Sessions should timeout after 15 minutes of inactivity.
Concurrent sessions from different devices should be blocked — one active session per user at a time.
Minimum 12 characters, must include uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special characters.
Data export capability for GDPR subject access requests. Users must be able to download all their data in a machine-readable format within 30 days of request.
Data retention policy. After a user account is closed, their data should be anonymized within 60 days, not deleted — anonymized.
We need a data retention policy.
We had an incident last year and the board is very firm on this.
The board is very firm on this.

solutions.statement: Auth0 with MFA enabled. It supports TOTP and SMS-based second factor out of the box.
assumptions: Should be fine for the scale

solutions.statement: Postgres has TDE — transparent data encryption. I'll enable that.
I've set token expiry to 1 hour. We can adjust later.
scope_limitations: Token expiry might be too short

solutions.statement: Let's do 30 minutes idle timeout. That should be safe enough.
scope_limitations: Session timeout might not be long enough
assumptions: Should be fine for the scale

solutions.statement: That works for now. We can move to something like OpenSearch later if the volume gets crazy.
scope_limitations: Audit logs might not be implemented in time

solutions.statement: I'll set minimum 8 characters with complexity requirements. Standard stuff.
assumptions: Password policy might not be strict enough

solutions.statement: We can move to something like OpenSearch later if the volume gets crazy.
scope_limitations: Audit logs might not be implemented in time

solutions.statement: Let's focus on getting the core auth flow working first.

gaps.description: GDPR implementation details for EU deployment are missing.
gaps.suggested_action: Provide detailed GDPR compliance plan and timeline for EU deployment.

gaps.description: Session timeout of 30 minutes is shorter than required 15 minutes.
gaps.suggested_action: Extend session timeout to at least 15 minutes.

gaps.description: Concurrent sessions from different devices are not blocked as required.
Assumes scale is fine without implementing audit logs in time.
gaps.suggested_action: Re-evaluate assumption on scalability and implement audit logs as required

gaps.description: Requirement for data retention policy is unclear.
gaps.suggested_action: Clarify requirement for data retention policy
Develop and implement incident response plan

gaps.description: Board's firm stance on security is not reflected in solution.
gaps.suggested_action: Ensure board's requirements are incorporated into the solution
